title: Leitstand operator observability hardening
goal: Harden the Leitstand operator-execution observation slice so /bureau and /checkouts display Bureau and Grabowski state through honest snapshot artifacts, safe public fixtures, consistent navigation, and aligned runtime/static documentation without giving Leitstand execution authority.
completion: Execution-axis snapshot controllers prefer artifacts, degrade to fixtures only in explicit dev/preview modes, and label source_kind honestly.
The producer bridge emits contract-normalized Bureau lifecycle and checkout retention values with tests.
Public fixtures and rendered UI do not expose real local operator paths unless explicitly running in internal debug mode.
All primary Leitstand views share coherent navigation for the new Bureau and Checkout surfaces.
README, docs/index.md, docs/data-flow.md, .ai-context.yml and runtime/static mode docs agree on the current operator-ecosystem role.
Static mirror and GitHub Pages behavior are either implemented for read-only routes or explicitly bounded/disabled.
A producer runbook explains who generates Bureau/Grabowski raw exports, when snapshots refresh, and what stale/missing states mean.

findings: Leitstand local branch feat/operator-execution-observability exists as dirty work on head 791b8313c220c900f62a75b9a1d8ed731fba9535 with no open PR.
The proposed /bureau and /checkouts slice has green lint/typecheck/build/observer-invariant/docs-relations/generated-files/drift-gates locally.
Producer bridge writes artifacts/bureau-tasks.json and artifacts/checkout-inventory.json, while controllers default to src/fixtures/*.json.
Producer bridge currently preserves raw Bureau state values such as open even though the contract text promises canonical lifecycle states.
New fixtures contain real-looking local paths under /home/alex even though leitstand is a public repository.
Navigation differs across views; /bureau and /checkouts are not reachable consistently from older views.
README still documents pnpm dev, but package.json has no dev script.
.ai-context.yml still says the UI repo is profile-free although docs/decisions/wgx-leitstand.md records a tracked WGX profile.
Static build currently renders only index, observatory and intent while the docs describe a public/static mirror mode.
GitHub Pages deploy on main failed with 404 because Pages appears not enabled or the workflow should be made optional/disabled.
metadata.alternative_axis: make the observer-source seam truthful before polishing UI
